dto.creator: achriston

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
• Set up the Standard Neonatal Environment as shown in Chapter 2.1
  • Ensure, all devices are running and connected to the Network
  • Ensure, that the TAI-Server application is running on the notebook connected to the ASL-5000
  • Enable the magic key “Fast APV / ASV controller DISABLED”
  • Enable the magic key "Neo APV Plimit 100mbar".
  • If not already done run all calibrations and tests in the “Preop check”-tab with the correct humidification type
  • Set the leakage valve to 20% (±5%) by using Vti and Vte of the IMT Flow Analyser (Vte = 0.8 * Vti) (You can run “Vent Mode: Set Leakage for Neonatal” on https://medical-portal.hamilton.ch/apps/ait-mgmt/testCases/66/revisions/0 to set the leakage valve)
  • Run the last released version of the test case “[STBR] PPL.0003 Ventilation Mode ((S)CMV+) neonatal automatic FULL” with the ID 92 on Medical Portal: AIT Management.
  • After the test is executed, export the test results and copy them into the tables of the test-case.
testSectionDTOList.title: Test Preparation

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied PEEP and tidal volume are tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 90 seconds.
  • Stores two measurements of Vti and Vte from the ventilator in the variables [VTE_VENTILATOR_1], [VTI_VENTILATOR_1], [VTE_VENTILATOR_2], [VTI_VENTILATOR_2]
  • Stores one measurement of Vti and Vte read from the Flow-Analyser in [VTE_FLOWANALYSER], [VTI_FLOWANALYSER].
  • The block takes two measurements from the ventilator, in case the first one is taken while the Controller is auto-zeroing, resulting in an invalid measurement.

(Scripting)-Block:

  • Checks the ventilator measurements from the (Exec)-block for invalid values and substitutes invalid values by a spare measurement if necessary.
  • Calculates VT from the ventilator and stores it in the variable [VT_VENTILATOR].
  • Calculates VT from the flow-analyser and stores it in the variable [VT_FLOWANALYSER].
    Note: The value in [VT_VENTILATOR] is stored in microliter.

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates PEEP measured by the ventilator and by the flow-analyser
  • Evaluates the calculated VT in [VT_FLOWANALYSER] and in [VT_VENTILATOR]
  • Evaluates the Peak-Pressure by the ventilator and by the flow-analyser for low Target-volumes

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: Tidal Volume and PEEP

VTI_VENTILATOR = VTI_VENTILATOR_1 if VTI_VENTILATOR_1 > 0 else VTI_VENTILATOR_2;

  • Measured PPeak > Target-Peep + 5mbar (i.e. Pinsp of APV-controller > 5mbar)
  • Measured Peep = Target-Peep 
  • Measured Volume = Target-Volume

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied inspiration pressure and the applied PEEP of mandatory machine-triggered breaths are tested when Plimit is at the maximum value of 100mbar.  It verifies that the maximum applied pressure is 100mbar, limited by "Pressure limitation". The sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance. 

(Setup)-Block: Sets control settings and the upper Pmax alarm limit.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits a certain time to reach steady-state.

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Asserts that the "Pressure limitation" alarm is present.
  • Evaluates PEEP measured by the ventilator and by the flow-analyser
  • Evaluates the Peak-Pressure by the ventilator and by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........Mandatory machine-triggered breaths with VT = max, Plimit = max {C6}
................(ASL)Mandatory machine-triggered breaths with VT = max, Plimit = max {C6}
................(Setup)Mandatory machine-triggered breaths with VT = max, Plimit = max {C6}
................(Exec)Mandatory machine-triggered breaths with VT = max, Plimit = max {C6}

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied rate and inspiration time with TI-philosophy are tested. The sequence for each partial test is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 90 seconds.
  • Stores the inspiration Time measured by the flow-analyser in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER]

(Scripting)-Block: Multiplies the value in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER] by 1000 and stores it in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]. Note: The value is multiplied due to insufficient capabilities of AIT to evaluate floating-point numbers.

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates the inspiration time measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the inspiration time in [INSPT_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the applied rate measured by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: Rate and Inspiration Time with TI-Philosophy

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor inspiration time of FlowAnalyser by a factor of 1000
Factor inspiration time of FlowAnalyser by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the applied Rate and inspiration time are tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 90 seconds.
  • Stores two measurements of inspiration time and expiration time from the ventilator in the variables [TI_VENTILATOR_1], [TE_VENTILATOR_1], [TI_VENTILATOR_2], [TE_VENTILATOR_2]
  • Stores one measurement of inspiration time and expiration time from the flow-analyser in the variables [TI_FLOWANALYSER], [TE_FLOWANALYSER].
    Note: The block takes two measurements from the ventilator, in case the first one is taken while the controller is auto-zeroing, resulting in an invalid measurement.

(Scripting)-Block:

  • Checks the ventilator measurements from the (Exec)-block for invalid values and substitutes invalid values by a spare measurement if necessary.
  • Calculates the applied I:E-Ratio measured by the ventilator and stores it in [I_E_VENTILATOR_FACTORED]
  • Calculates the applied I:E-Ratio measured by the flow-analyser and stores it in [I_E_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
    Note: The value is multiplied due to insufficient capabilities of AIT to evaluate floating-point numbers.

(Evaluation)-Block:

  • Evaluates the applied I:E-Ratio in [I_E_VENTILATOR_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied I:E-Ratio in [I_E_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]
  • Evaluates the applied Rate measured by the ventilator
  • Evaluates the applied Rate measured by the flow-analyser

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: Rate and I:E-Ratio with I:E-Philosophy

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the minimal applied expiration time is tested. For each partial test, the sequence is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for an appropriate time to reach steady-state.
  • Stores one measurement of the expiration time measured by the Flow-Analyser in the variable [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER].

(Scripting)-Block: Multiplies the value stored in [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER] by a factor of 1000 and stores it in [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED].

(Evaluation)-Block: Evaluates the applied expiration time stored in [EXP_TIME_FLOWANALYSER_FACTORED]

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
testSectionDTOList.title: TexpMin

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman: This test shows that the expiration phase of a mandatory machine-triggered breath can be terminated after 0.2 s.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin without patient effort (C6-Rate = 80b/min, Tinsp = 0.55s) => Texp = 0.20s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
All patient breaths are detected. This shows that the expiration phase of a mandatory patient-triggered breath can be terminated after 0.2 s. 

Here, the defined TI ventilator setting leads to the applied inspiration phase time.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin with patient effort (ASL-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.80s) => Texp = 0.20s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: If first measurement is taken, while trigger was not detected, take the second measurement
Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Only each 2nd patient effort is detected. This shows that patient efforts inside the TexpMin-window are ineffective. The expected applied expiration phase time is 1.05 s.

Here, the defined TI ventilator setting leads to the applied inspiration phase time.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.95s) => Texp = 1.05s

................(Exec)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.95s) => Texp = 1.05s

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue: Factor Expiration time by a factor of 1000

testSectionDTOList.title: ................(Scripting)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.95s) => Texp = 1.05s
................(Evaluation)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.95s) => Texp = 1.05s
................(CleanUp)TexpMin with ineffective patient effort (ASL-Rate = 60b/min, Tinsp = 0.95s) => Texp = 1.05s

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
In this test, the minimal applied pressure by the ventilator is tested. The test is passed, if the applied peak pressure is 5 mbar (minimal inspiration pressure) above the set PEEP, and the applied tidal volume is higher than the set target volume. The sequence for this test is:

(ASL)->(Setup)->(Exec)->(Scripting)->(Evaluation)->(CleanUp)

(ASL)-Block: Sets ASL resistance and compliance according to the product requirements.

(Setup)-Block: Sets predefined values according to the product requirements.

(Exec)-Block:

  • Starts ventilation.
  • Waits for 90 seconds.
  • Stores one measurement of the inspiration and expiration volume measured by the flow-analyser in the variables [VTI_FLOWANALYSER] and [VTE_FLOWANALYSER].

(Scripting)-Block: Calculates the applied tidal volume and stores it in [VT_FLOWANALYSER].

(Evaluation)-Block: Evaluates the applied peak pressure measured by the flow-analyser. Evaluates the applied tidal volume stored in [VT_FLOWANALYSER]

(CleanUp)-Block: Stops ventilation.
